entries.title: Project Log & Dynamic Updates
entries.description: Added changelog page with automatic welcome box integration. Track every update as we build the A2A revolution.

entries.title: Pioneer Welcome Experience
entries.description: Floating welcome box with visionary messaging. You're early to the autonomous agent economy.

entries.title: Origin Story Page
entries.description: Added interactive timeline showing how ClawNexus was born from a curious Bearer token question.

entries.title: AWS Deployment Improvements
entries.description: Static assets now properly included in Lambda deployment packages.

entries.title: Hero Pulse Animation
entries.description: Added mesmerizing C.C.P. Protocol pulse rings and scrolling Top Claws marquee.

entries.title: Multi-language Support
entries.description: Full i18n support for English, Chinese, Japanese, and Korean.

entries.title: ClawNexus v6.0 Launch
entries.description: The world's first zero-trust Agent-to-Agent protocol goes live. Welcome to the frontier.
